faqs.question: Are admissions to Raffles university entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to Raffles University are entrance-based. The university conducts its own situation test, results in which are considered for admission. Additionally, a personal interview round is also conducted at the university and clearing this is mandatory. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for applying for admission.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Raffles University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Raffles University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Raffles University courses range between INR 25,000 to 4,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Raffles University charges a one-time academic security fee of INR 5,000 for the BCom programme. This amount is refundable at the end of the course, provided there are no dues or damages. It is collected during admission and is separate from the tuition fee. Students are advised to keep the receipt safe for future reference.
faqs.question: What is the BCom academic security fee at Raffles University?

The tuition fee must be justified in a way that the facilities, faculty, and the curriculum provided to the candidates are up to the mark. The total tuition fee is valued at INR 2,40,000.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA course at Raffles University?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee of studying BBA at Raffles University is INR 60,000. The total fee may include other components like security deposits, enrolment fee, hostel fee, exam fee, etc. Though as compared to many other private institutions the fees might be considered decent for BBA course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied. It is the worst college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is bad. There is a lack of instruments in labs. The required equipment for experiments is not available. The canteen does not have good food items. It does not have proper seating arrangements.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are bad, and the management is also bad. Sometimes, exam results are not given on time. Most staff members are either inexperienced or very old and lack proper knowledge.
review_content.Other: Fests and other functions do not happen in this college. The college is not good. There is no discipline. Students may regret joining this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college’s performance.

review_content.Placements: According to the HOD of our School of Engineering and Technology, most graduates start their own businesses. He also told us that last year a student got 73 LPA. But we have found seniors wandering here and there like fools, not doing anything.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are just in name, providing us old computers, and some keyboards do not even have keys. We have a library, but I have not found a single student studying in it, and although there is AC, they do not switch it on. The classroom is worse and similar to a government school.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Not quite satisfied with the university.

review_content.Placements: Our HOD told us that if you study then you would have good placement and told us that last year in engineering department. 70 LPA is grabbed by him. They promised placement if you study. For internship, they told us we got that at end of 2nd semester though not sure right now.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are not provided Wi-Fi for use. Don't provide us suitable table and chair for studying even we don't have smart board. Even for library, we don't get to use AC and internet. Books are also mostly of holder edition. Our department does not good building, no AC, and heavily depends on electricity.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is not worth taking admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: The number of placements is really low. Only a few students get a good package for their course. Some teachers help students study better and achieve a good package, but mostly students do not study. Teachers also show little interest. Sometimes, even if a student goes to them for help, they do not give a good reply.
review_content.Infrastructure: Right now, I am in the 1st year, and the School of Engineering and Technology has poor facilities. They do not have Wi-Fi or good classrooms. The power supply is often shut down. The student crowd is poor in terms of study. Only a few students are really interested in coding. Other students just bunk classes and roam around. As a student from Delhi, I am having problems fitting in among these students and teachers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure. All facilities are available for local students.

review_content.Placements: About 70-80% students were placed in around 6 LPA-30 LPA jobs by our university. Mainly, Japanese Companies hire from our university. Around 50-60% of students in the B.Sc. got an internship. Mainly, university does not guarantee our placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained, and AC, Wi-Fi, and all facilities are available. All the labs are here, and the library is very huge. The hostel is very luxurious, but only a few students were taking admission in the hostel because it was too expensive, and all facilities are available in the hostel. Open ground all around the hostel, mountain views, and perfect surroundings and the food in the mess was nice to eat. The canteen was also near the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with college, but I have no other choice, as you know, due to a financial problem.

review_content.Placements: I don't know about placement, but the owner of the college told us at orientation that 25 students are chosen for Dubai jobs. Our engineering department HOD said that last year's students in the engineering department got 70 LPA, and some started companies worth 1 crore.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms like schools with no AC or smart boards, while our building is too small compared to the lawns and pharmacy one, and the seats are not comfortable. Labs are somewhat good to work in, that's all. Some keyboards are there, and some work, and some don't. There is no cafeteria or food court. I mean, it is there, but it's not open. The library is good for passing the time. No student goes there to study, and despite having AC, they won't turn it on, so students watch web series and games there.

admission_overview.college_name: Raffles University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Raffles University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Raffles University admission 2025 is merit and entrance-based. It gives courses at both UG and PG levels, such as BA LLB, BBA, Btech, MCA, M Pharma, MBA, etc. Additionally, the university has courses at the Doctoral level and Diploma Level. Raffles University conducts its own exam, i.e., a situation test and a PI round for admission to its different courses given. Also, candidates can appear for the national or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, CLAT, CUET, etc., but these are not mandatory for admission. Candidates seeking admission to the university must fill out the application forms available on the official website or offline by visiting the campus.

eligibility_selection.title: Raffles University Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description:
Raffles University eligibility and selection criteria is different from course to course. Candidates seeking admission in the institute must make sure fulfiling the eligibility criteria before applying for their preferred course. For admission to the university, candidates must appear for the entrance exams to be eligible to apply.
They must appear for the situation test conducted by the university. The selection criteria are divided into two parts- the situation test and the personal interview. Below are Raffles University courses with their eligibility and selection criteria: - Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Pass bachelor's with minimun 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)

Pass class 12 with minimun 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies.
Pass class 12 from any recognised board
Pass class 12 with minimun 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Pass class 10 with minimum 35% aggregate from any recognised board
As per norms of UGC & University Ph.D Ordinance
Pass class 12 with minimun 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Pass bachelor's with minimun 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)
Pass class 12 with minimun 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)

faqs.answer: Yes, the selection criteria is same for all courses at Raffles University. The university requires candidates to appear for the situation test followed by a personal interview round. Bpth of these are conducted offline at the university campus itself. Candidates must ensure fulfilling the eligibility criteria before applying for admission and submit the required documents before the last date.
faqs.question: Is the selection criteria same for all courses at Raffles University?

faqs.answer: The BPharm admission at Raffles University is completely merit-based. Students are required to submit their Class 12 marks, particularly in subjects like Physics, Chemistry, and Biology or Mathematics, to be considered for admission. No entrance test is needed.
faqs.question: Is BPharm admission at Raffles University merit-based or entrance-based?

admission_process.title: Raffles University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Raffles University admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Raffles University, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science.

Some of the popular Raffles University programmes are B.A. and B.Sc., etc at UG level and M.A. and M.Sc. at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Raffles University admissions:

courses_data.name: Raffles University BTech Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Raffles Universityoffers a 4 years B.E. / B.Tech programme at the UG level. The course is divided into 8 semesters. Aspirants are offered admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The total tuition fees for B.E. / B.Tech isINR 1,20,000. Check below the eligibility criteria for B.E. / B.Tech: Eligibility Criteria

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech in Raffles University?
faqs.answer: The following is the step included in the admission procedure for the B.Tech course at Raffles University. After filling up the online application form provided on the authorized website of the University, the candidates are required to submit it. Further, there will be a shortlisting of candidates followed by an invitation for a Situation Test carrying the weightage of 40%, and then a Personal Interview carrying the weightage of 60%. All taken together, these entrance tests define the admission

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at Raffles University?
faqs.answer: No, there is no direct admission to B.Tech at Raffles UniversityThe students should register through the official portal of Raffles University.The candidates must have atleast 45 percent aggregate score with maths, physics, and chemistry as mandatory subjects. There is an entrance test and the interview process. Further they will filter the candidates based on their performance.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied. It is the worst college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is bad. There is a lack of instruments in labs. The required equipment for experiments is not available. The canteen does not have good food items. It does not have proper seating arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college’s performance.
reviews.review_text: Labs are just in name, providing us old computers, and some keyboards do not even have keys. We have a library, but I have not found a single student studying in it, and although there is AC, they do not switch it on. The classroom is worse and similar to a government school.

reviews.review_heading: Not quite satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: We are not provided Wi-Fi for use. Don't provide us suitable table and chair for studying even we don't have smart board. Even for library, we don't get to use AC and internet. Books are also mostly of holder edition. Our department does not good building, no AC, and heavily depends on electricity.

reviews.review_heading: It is not worth taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Right now, I am in the 1st year, and the School of Engineering and Technology has poor facilities. They do not have Wi-Fi or good classrooms. The power supply is often shut down. The student crowd is poor in terms of study. Only a few students are really interested in coding. Other students just bunk classes and roam around. As a student from Delhi, I am having problems fitting in among these students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure. All facilities are available for local students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-maintained, and AC, Wi-Fi, and all facilities are available. All the labs are here, and the library is very huge. The hostel is very luxurious, but only a few students were taking admission in the hostel because it was too expensive, and all facilities are available in the hostel. Open ground all around the hostel, mountain views, and perfect surroundings and the food in the mess was nice to eat. The canteen was also near the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with college, but I have no other choice, as you know, due to a financial problem.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms like schools with no AC or smart boards, while our building is too small compared to the lawns and pharmacy one, and the seats are not comfortable. Labs are somewhat good to work in, that's all. Some keyboards are there, and some work, and some don't. There is no cafeteria or food court. I mean, it is there, but it's not open. The library is good for passing the time. No student goes there to study, and despite having AC, they won't turn it on, so students watch web series and games t...

reviews.review_heading: Colleges are all the best. You do hard work with the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is clean and well-maintained by the facilities. Classrooms are digitally equipped labs are very well stocked. There are Wi-Fi settled rooms and amazing works. All are plus points to the departments. The facilities are very well in hostels. Many sports and games scheduled.

reviews.review_heading: This is a decent college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well furnished with the facility of Wi-Fi. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The library is well equipped with all sorts of books for research works as well as for enhancement of knowledge in any field which students want. Mess and canteen are clean and hygienic, the medical facility is available 24X7. Annual sports fest is also conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Raffles gave me a chance to grow, not just in studies but also in other activities.
reviews.review_text: The life I lived in Raffles as a student was one of the best. The hostel, library and open atmosphere with no pollution are great. Sports facilities are great as well. The rooms are spacious and air-conditioned. High-speed internet is available to every student to access the world wide web.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is excellent in our Raffles University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is the best place here as Raffles provides single-seater rooms to every student. The hostel facilities are very good. A gym and a TV room are available. Mess is common for both girls and boys, and the quality of food is very nice. The mess is also very nice. Library, labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and everything is perfect here.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is the best for everyone who wants to take admission in whichever course.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure facilities are provided in our university. Well-equipped classrooms are available for students as well as a student-friendly environment is available for their best interest. Library is updated with weekly digests as well as new updated books every month. Talking about the hostel facilities, it is well equipped, single-seater rooms are available as well as a doctor is available 24X7 on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place for students who want to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: It has a well-maintained infrastructure around hills and greenery It is a pollution-free area. There are well-built classrooms, a library, labs, and a moot courtroom. We also have well-maintained single occupancy rooms in hostels (air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned) rooms with facilities of Wi-Fi, laundry, etc. The mess is hygienic. The quality of food served is better than other colleges. The canteen is also hygienic. We have a playground for cricket, basketball, badminton, and tennis that...

reviews.review_heading: It is among the good colleges. I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Facilities in the hostel are pretty adequate with internet double-occupancy rooms. The quality of food served in a mess is great as compared to different universities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university and specific for the law. I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: This university provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms with air-conditioners and a projector. We have a centralised library, conference rooms, labs, and seminar hall. In the hostel, facilities like mess with good qualities of food, canteen, medical facilities, sports, games, and laundry, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best law school in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is good. It has a centralized library, separate rooms with an air-conditioner in our hostel. It provides a common room and sports room in our hostels. University also provides a gym facility. It has cricket and football grounds. There are also tennis and basketball courts.

On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, AAR Mahaveer Engineering College has a rating of 3.5 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.5, 3, 3.8 and 3.7 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: AAR Mahaveer Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I feel good here. From any perspective, it is a good college to join for average students.

content.Placements: In this college, placements are average. In CSE, it is good. The highest package is 16 LPA. We cannot expect very much package, and it is below 16 LPA. The lowest package is 8 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Hyundai, etc., are visiting the college to conduct job interviews.
content.Infrastructure: It is good for greenery. We can sit in a garden in a free time and it is good. Labs are very neat and clean. The canteen is also good for spending free time. Medical facilities are not much, but in an emergency, they provide an ambulance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of the lack of teachers.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 40% of students are placed in our course. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc., visit our campus. Top roles offered are system analyst, database administrator, web developer, and project manager. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 8 LPA. More than 20% of students get internships at Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a principal office and an administrative office. There are auditoriums, air-conditioned rooms, central instrumentation facilities, and computer labs available. The hostel premises comprise a separate dining facility for hostel residents. The mess serves breakfast and lunch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has a peaceful environment and good faculty members to gain knowledge.

content.Placements: About 20% of students are placed in various companies. The salary packages offered are around 7 LPA - 15 LPA. Top recruiters are Genpact, Wipro, Cognizant, Mahindra, etc. About 5% of students got internships in various companies. The top roles offered are web developer, data analyst, etc. The students employed in the companies are well trained for the company requirements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hostel facility separately for boys and girls with free Wi-Fi and the college has a library and various labs in it. The classrooms in college are very good and have a peaceful surrounding by greenery. The food served in the hostel and canteen is very hygienic and tasty. The college has very good indoor and outdoor playgrounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with study duration and teachers are passionate.

content.Placements: Placements are low. I was mechanical branch but I didn't get as many placement offers. Most of the computer science students get placed. Design engineer, quality control, etc. are key roles. There is also AutoCAD to learn.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the labs are well-equipped and the infrastructure is good. Library has books sufficient for our course but there are not many varieties in the books. Classrooms are spacious and well maintained. Every Saturday is a sports period.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really a good college. The infrastructure are so good .

content.Placements: In our college the placement are at very moderate level. The highest and the lowest packages are 15 lakhs per annum and the lowest is 4-5 lakhs per annum. Companies like tech Mahindra, Dell, cognizant, Microsoft etc. and many more start up company come for recruitment. .
content.Infrastructure: In my college hostels are above average but you can sustain very well and food is excellent. It feels like home food I stayed in the hostel for 2 years and hostel rooms are very well maintained and in evening there will be a special study hour for students .

cut_off.college_name: AAR Mahaveer Engineering College Cutoff 2025: Check TS EAMCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: AAR Mahaveer Engg College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the AAR Mahaveer Engg College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

AAR Mahaveer Engg College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 23500 and 102892 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the firs

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 23500, 34682 and 38805, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to AAR Mahaveer Engg College. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The food served in the canteen is good. The hostel is secure, as it has security guards and also CCTV cameras. Our college conducts events every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is good, in our laboratories students have systems with good Wi-Fi with a speed network. The classrooms are good but in the library, they give students old books. Students have a hostel and the food served is average. The hostel is clean. If students need medical, then they will arrange it. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good. It provides quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has good lab and library facilities. Classrooms are very neat and clean with a capacity of 60 students. The college also has an indoor stadium for playing indoor games like badminton, table tennis, chess, carrom, etc. It has a huge ground for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college to complete the degree.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel facility is good but has very strict rules to be followed. The food quality is good and the room is also very good and cleaned every day. Wi-Fi is also available in our college hostel, but no medical facilities are available. Sports, etc are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in our college, and the infrastructure is normal. The library is good. There are good labs, but some machines are or not working. There is good ground, and we also have an indoor stadium. Our college hostel is good but has strict rules. The food served is good and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It was just average college no good faculty no good placements .
reviews.review_text: We have a good class rooms and solar power system having indoor stadium and large ground and the library is just average no Wi-Fi signal in our college as my college hostel is really good and good food quality we use to play in college ground at evening time. We are enjoying the college life.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good environment, and faculty members and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities, infrastructure, Wi-Fi and ground. Our college conducts events. Wi-Fi is also good. The environment is good, and I am enjoying college life. Our college has good labs and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: There are no proper faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college was very good and huge and had different blocks for different courses. But the Wi-Fi facility is not available, and labs equipment was somewhat fine. However, the canteen was very good, and we can get all types of food items. Sports meets are conducted very less number of times. The library was a little bit small, and the hostel facility is also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who like nature.
reviews.review_text: The college comes under JNTUH. The infrastructure of our college will be good. AAR Mahaveer also has many Wi-Fi hotspots for students as well as for faculty members. It also has ground and an indoor stadium where many states-wise competitions are conducted. Canteen food is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It provides a good ground for games like basketball, cricket, etc. The college provides good and huge canteen, and it serves good food for students. Labs are available. The library is good, and all books are available for the students. Wi-Fi is available on some floors in some branches. Classrooms are good, and there is no Wi-Fi facility in it. There are no smart classrooms and a projector facility for students. I am a bit disappointed here, but it has ...

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Lakshmi Narain College Of Technology, Jabalpur?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lakshmi Narain College Of Technology, Jabalpur offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Lakshmi Narain College Of Technology, Jabalpur courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Lakshmi Narain College Of Technology, Jabalpur courses stands around INR 39,000 to 97,200.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but it is operating based on the reputation of LNCT Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: Our college somehow provides campus placements, but they are not much great. However, with the help of a training and placement cell, many students have been placed in reputed companies. I am currently in my 3rd year B.Tech of CSE branch. There are limited students like a maximum of 60 students. But in our class, there are only 20 students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is not huge, but it is good. Our campus is enabled with Wi-Fi, and a library and computer lab are available. Moreover, there is a canteen facility. I do not stay in the hostel, but some students told me that there is no mess in the hostel. So students have to manage the food on their own by bringing tiffin or other sources.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: NIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to the BTech courses. During the Round 1 cutoff, the closing rank for CSE was 25886 for the General category students under the AII India Quota. Among OBC candidates, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 8750. Candidates seeking admisison to NIT Manipur can refer to the table below to check out the Round 1 closing ranks for BTech in CSE course for various categories under the AI quota: CategoryJEE Main 2024 Expected CutoffCommon Rank List90-91Gen-EWS75-76OBC-NCL73-74SC51-52ST37-38PwD0.0013527
faqs.question: Q: What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?

faqs.answer: Lakshmi Narain College Of Technology, Jabalpur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Candidate who has passed qualifying examination with grace marks are also eligible for admission. Candidates whose qualifying examination marksheet are based on grading system has to produce conversion of grade to marks.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch with mentioned percentage. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%. Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.

Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis.
Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.

Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, but it is operating based on the reputation of LNCT Bhopal.

content.Placements: Our college somehow provides campus placements, but they are not much great. However, with the help of a training and placement cell, many students have been placed in reputed companies. I am currently in my 3rd year B.Tech of CSE branch. There are limited students like a maximum of 60 students. But in our class, there are only 20 students.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is not huge, but it is good. Our campus is enabled with Wi-Fi, and a library and computer lab are available. Moreover, there is a canteen facility. I do not stay in the hostel, but some students told me that there is no mess in the hostel. So students have to manage the food on their own by bringing tiffin or other sources.

college_info.college_name: St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University)

highlights.summary: Established in 1880, St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) is a private university in Mangalore, Karnataka. The institute is approved by the BCI and AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 120 courses across 18 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) programs include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc. and MCA. St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Design and Mass Communication & Media, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1691 students. The fees at St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) ranges between INR 18,000 to 8,64,000 for the different courses. St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 3,23,854. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and I am satisfied.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in my course for a degree in microbiology, 2 to 3 LPA for a Master's, and 6 to 8 LPA. We will get jobs in hospitals, laboratories, and the food and dairy industry. Internships in clinical settings, hospitals, laboratories, and industries. Top roles for this course are microbiologist, laboratory technician, quality assurance, etc. They are eligible in hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our department, and the network is also not good. Labs are provided with every instrument and chemical. Classrooms and libraries are good. Every facility is provided with more than 1000 books. The hostel and PG are provided with good-quality food and good facilities. The mess canteen in college also provides hygienic food. Sports and games are eligible for both girls and boys; we can participate in any of the sports in which we are interested.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 50 percent of students are placed in our course. For degree students, the package is 2 to 3 LPA, and for Masters, it is 6 to 8 LPA. Placements are offered in hospitals, laboratories, food, and dairy industries. Internships are provided in clinical, hospital, laboratory, and industrial sectors. Top roles include microbiologist, laboratory technician, quality assurance, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, and every facility is provided. PG and hostels are provided by the college, and these hostels and PGs offer good quality food. Mess and canteen facilities are also provided with hygienic food. Sports and games are provided for both girls and boys as per their interest.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Economics, History, Political Science) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Quality education and holistic development.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of the students are placed with an average package of 3.4 LPA-4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc., offering roles like analyst, developer, and associate. Internship opportunities are decent, especially in the finance and IT sectors. Placement assistance is also available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is clean and secure and provides basic amenities with decent food. The campus has smart classrooms and well-equipped sports facilities, library, and supportive academic environment. There are 2 canteens providing decent food in clean environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good and satisfied about course provided in college.

review_content.Placements: More than 50 percent of students are placed in our course. For degree 2 to 4 LPA and for Masters in Microbiology 3 to 6 LPA. Like industry, hospital, Food and dairy, Pharmaceutical Companies, research ets. Internships in a hospital, food industry. Food and dairy industry, laboratories, hospitals, research and clinical roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college Wi-Fi is not available, classrooms are good and better, libraries are very good, labs provide every instrument and chemical we need. From the College they arrange the facilities for hostels and PG, the quality of food available in the mess and canteens is good. Sports and games there are several facilities for both girls and boys.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A very traditional college vibes with restrictions to some extent, very savage and cool teachers.

review_content.Placements: Most students chose placements in which they are trained, and top companies recruited them. Almost 43 percent are placed with packages of 3.6–10 LPA in my year, including both PG and UG students. Top companies are EY, Deloitte, and Accenture. All students had to do internships. There are programs where almost 50–70 companies came to recruit students. Top roles are tax audit, accounting staff, and systems and applications services.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, and no network due to the central jail located nearby the college. The rest of the facilities are the best, campus is very hygienic, the food is tasty, classrooms are neat, and the library has every kind of book we need. We had various kinds of extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good campus life and standard of living.

review_content.Placements: 95 percent of students were placed in the course. The highest package offered was 3 LPA, the lowest package offered was 50k. The average package offered was 1.5 LPA. Top recruiters were Deloitte, EY, KPMG, and many more companies. 60 percent of students are in corporate. Accounting, Administrative, Lecturer M.Com, and many more top roles were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library have a good space to learn, and we had a good Wi-Fi connection, so we can do our presentation and work to be done. The food quality was okay, average, not that good. There were many options to choose from and good staff offering us food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our department, and the network is also not good. Labs are provided with every instrument and chemical. Classrooms and libraries are good. Every facility is provided with more than 1000 books. The hostel and PG are provided with good-quality food and good facilities. The mess canteen in college also provides hygienic food. Sports and games are eligible for both girls and boys; we can participate in any of the sports in which we are interested.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, and every facility is provided. PG and hostels are provided by the college, and these hostels and PGs offer good quality food. Mess and canteen facilities are also provided with hygienic food. Sports and games are provided for both girls and boys as per their interest.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 11 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Quality education and holistic development.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is clean and secure and provides basic amenities with decent food. The campus has smart classrooms and well-equipped sports facilities, library, and supportive academic environment. There are 2 canteens providing decent food in clean environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good and satisfied about course provided in college.
reviews.review_text: In our college Wi-Fi is not available, classrooms are good and better, libraries are very good, labs provide every instrument and chemical we need. From the College they arrange the facilities for hostels and PG, the quality of food available in the mess and canteens is good. Sports and games there are several facilities for both girls and boys.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A very traditional college vibes with restrictions to some extent, very savage and cool teachers.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, and no network due to the central jail located nearby the college. The rest of the facilities are the best, campus is very hygienic, the food is tasty, classrooms are neat, and the library has every kind of book we need. We had various kinds of extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus life and standard of living.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library have a good space to learn, and we had a good Wi-Fi connection, so we can do our presentation and work to be done. The food quality was okay, average, not that good. There were many options to choose from and good staff offering us food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius Institute of Management and Information Technology (AIMIT)
reviews.review_heading: Top notch infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our course are the best. We got Wi-Fi, well-functioning labs, clean classrooms, and a good amount of books in the library. The food in our college mess is always fresh and clean. Medical facilities are also quite good. Sports and games are the best things for me in our college, I am personally more involved there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is very good with spacious classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, and a library that has all the required resources. Wi-Fi facility is available for students with proper permission, which helps in accessing study materials. Overall, the infrastructure is well-maintained and supports effective learning.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 18 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you want a great campus and a good education, then this is the place.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper free Wi-Fi only one hall has free Wi-Fi is there, the infrastructure of the labs and great also in the whole campus. There are 3 huge libraries with nice books. The hostel is okay. There are two hostels one near the college and one far it's okayish not highly recommended.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is good but not satisfied with teachers and placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure like college library, we have 4 libraries in our college for UG and PG students. Classrooms are digital and there are computer labs and other labs for science students. Hostel facility is not bad but food is not good. College canteen facility is good. There are various sports and games. Medical room for medical purposes is available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 4 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures provided are labs, classrooms, and library. There is not much they have offered, that too they have increased the batches and classes are less. They keep on switching classes now and then. I am not staying in the hostel. The food in the college canteen is average. Medical facilities I have never really seen any. Sports are the only thing I guess that is given very much important other than studies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 4 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college for education and showcasing your talents.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library are everything the best. Every facility is nice. I don't know as I don't stay in the hostel. For sports, they give importance and encourage students. Canteen is also good. Medical facilities are also good. Indoor games such as badminton and table tennis are there. Everything is nice here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 26 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: I am not sure about the girls' hostel but the boys' hostel is good. Wi-Fi is not provided for students. It is only available for departments. Labs are good and provide every facility. The library is provided with 5,000 books. Classrooms are clean and have projectors in every class.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 26 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the good faculty.
reviews.review_text: I don't regret taking this course. The Wi-Fi and facilities are good, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are neat and clean. The library is provided with more than 5,000 books. Boys' and girls' hostels both have good facilities, and I am not sure about girl's hostel, but boy's hostel provides good food along with other amenities like sports, games, and a canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overview and facilities of the college.
reviews.review_text: The canteen facilities are also much better. The hostel facilities are much better and provide sufficient amenities like food, maintenance, etc.

college_info.college_name: Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara:

college_info.intro: Neotech Institute of Technology Vadodara popular prorammes is B.E./ BTech. B.E./BTech students are offered high-tech computer labs. The students are taught by well-trained faculties. Hence, Neotech Institute of Technology Vadodara has well-furnished laboratories, workshops, and experienced faculties, and there are seminars arranged by experts. Overall, Neotech Institute of Technology Vadodara is one of the top colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Neotech Institute of Technology Vadodara and their respective eligibility and Neotech Institute of Technology Vadodara fee structure:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara offers PG Diploma. The fees for Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara courses range between INR 50,000 to 2,39,400.

faqs.answer: A:    Neotech Institute of Technology eligibility criteria specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a programme. Candidates can apply for UG courses with their Class 12 score. The minimum aggregate for most of the courses is 45%. Hence, candidates with 60% in Class 12 can apply for admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for Neotech Institute of Technology admission with 60% in Class 12?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our batch are average for mechanical steam. Eligibility criteria put by reputed corporate companies range from 60% to 65% aggregate with 0, 1 or 2 ATKTs. So, better academics will always help in performing the job better if you are selected. The selection process of tier-1 IT companies is almost non-technical-based. Once you are eligible, they select on the basis of good soft skills like communication skills, discipline, leadership, body language, expertise in English, team spirit, time management, etc. Companies which are related to core business domains select students on the basis of technical written test as well as screening for above-mentioned soft skills. Those skills can be developed over a period of time by participating in various training programmes and extracurricular activities in college and outside. Moreover, you have to participate and perform well in various student competitions of corporate companies. It is an alternate way of getting selected by them.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It has an average infrastructure, an affordable course fee and poor placements in 2020.

review_content.Placements: During my tenure, our college claimed that reputed companies visit here for placements. But at the end of the year, not even a single company visited here to offer placements for civil engineering students. After 2-4 months of completing the degree, our college has suggested a small company to do an internship with a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent classrooms, library and canteen. The library is available just for namesake, and there are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, medical, hostel and mess. There is some open space to play some games like football and cricket, but it is not maintained very well throughout the year.

review_summary.college_name: Neotechical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: A minimum of 6.5 CGPA is required for placements. The highest package offered is 15 LPA. The top recruiting company is L&T, Amul etc. The lowest package is 4 LPA. The top role offered is deputy engineer, project planner, and many other roles.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, halls, and very good hostel facilities are available in our college. The mess is good, clean and well-sanitized. Medical facilities are available in our college. I recommend joining this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the placements because are there are less companies associated with college.

content.Placements: The CRC team at NTC prepares students for campus placements by conducting teamwork programs and mock interviews. There are some top companies that students got placed in are Sun Pharma, TCS, IndianOil, Torrent Power, Polycab, and L&T technology services.
content.Infrastructure: Library is stocked with a huge range of educational and advanced books. NTC computer center is well-equipped with the latest IT facilities. There is a central workshop for mechanical fabrication work. There is also bus transportation for students and teachers. Cafeteria contains a variety of hygienic foods.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Review of Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara.

content.Placements: Placements in our batch are average for mechanical steam. Eligibility criteria put by reputed corporate companies range from 60% to 65% aggregate with 0, 1 or 2 ATKTs. So, better academics will always help in performing the job better if you are selected. The selection process of tier-1 IT companies is almost non-technical-based. Once you are eligible, they select on the basis of good soft skills like communication skills, discipline, leadership, body language, expertise in English, team spirit, time management, etc. Companies which are related to core business domains select students on the basis of technical written test as well as screening for above-mentioned soft skills. Those skills can be developed over a period of time by participating in various training programmes and extracurricular activities in college and outside. Moreover, you have to participate and perform well in various student competitions of corporate companies. It is an alternate way of getting selected by them.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has an average infrastructure, an affordable course fee and poor placements in 2020.

content.Placements: During my tenure, our college claimed that reputed companies visit here for placements. But at the end of the year, not even a single company visited here to offer placements for civil engineering students. After 2-4 months of completing the degree, our college has suggested a small company to do an internship with a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent classrooms, library and canteen. The library is available just for namesake, and there are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, medical, hostel and mess. There is some open space to play some games like football and cricket, but it is not maintained very well throughout the year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Placements were pretty decent. Our college has one of the best infrastructures in Gujarat.

content.Placements: About 25-30% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered ranges between 2-2.3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Companies like Collabera, Air-tech Engineers, etc., visit our college for placements. Many students from CS background got an internship in The One Web Technology.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are top-notch. The library has an ample amount of books right from the university books to all the reference books. Classrooms are spacious. Laboratories are segregated according to the departments. Computers in the CS labs were available with all the latest technologies.

library.description: Stocked with a huge range of educational and advanced books, periodicals, reference volumes, theses, and project reports, the NTC library is integrated with an automated system for easy and organized functioning.

Stocked with a huge range of educational and advanced books, periodicals, reference volumes, theses, and project reports, the NTC library is integrated with an automated system for easy and organized functioning.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, halls, and very good hostel facilities are available in our college. The mess is good, clean and well-sanitized. Medical facilities are available in our college. I recommend joining this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the placements because are there are less companies associated with college.
reviews.review_text: Library is stocked with a huge range of educational and advanced books. NTC computer center is well-equipped with the latest IT facilities. There is a central workshop for mechanical fabrication work. There is also bus transportation for students and teachers. Cafeteria contains a variety of hygienic foods.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Neotech Institute of Technology, Vadodara.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well developed with all facilities like labs, canteen, library, playground, easy bus facility and well-developed classrooms and workshop. The central workshop of NTC is set up to do all required mechanical fabrication work such as turning, milling, planning, grinding and abrasive cutting of hard materials. Key facilities available in the central workshop are machining, carpentry, blacksmithing and welding.

reviews.review_heading: It has an average infrastructure, an affordable course fee and poor placements in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent classrooms, library and canteen. The library is available just for namesake, and there are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, medical, hostel and mess. There is some open space to play some games like football and cricket, but it is not maintained very well throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were pretty decent. Our college has one of the best infrastructures in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are top-notch. The library has an ample amount of books right from the university books to all the reference books. Classrooms are spacious. Laboratories are segregated according to the departments. Computers in the CS labs were available with all the latest technologies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college was having the best infrastructure among all the colleges around Vadodara. Our department was provided with Wi-Fi in our computer lab and electrical high voltage lab. It was also available to test the circuit and to do practicals. There was a canteen available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very nice because of highly qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: In our department, there are very nice facilities for students. Wi-Fi facilities are available here. In the lab, all the instruments are available. The computer lab is available. For reading purpose, the library is available here. Hostel facilities are very nice in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides free Wi-Fi facility, but students can access through their ID only. The college provides facilities like library, machine lab, smart classrooms, auditorium, and reading room. Food served in the mess is good. Free Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel. All sports like cricket, football, and indoor games like table tennis are available for the students. Housekeeping is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is maintained and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully-equipped with practical labs of civil, mechanical, computer and electrical department. It also has a physiology department. There is a huge ground for sports, and the library and classrooms are maintained. Food quality of hostel is great, and the canteen area has designated with all kinds of food-related things like juice, fast food, snacks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides the best faculty, excellent knowledge and supporting nature.
reviews.review_text: Good drinking water facilities are available at our college. The college provides Wi-Fi with 1 Gb speed. The infrastructure of our college is good. The electrical department is one of the best department in our college. The college does not provide good stuff of books in the library. The college does not provide hostel facility for students. Food and sports facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the eye-catching infrastructure and meet very educated faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is so different and attractive. The campus is, so eye-catching at first glance. Huge garden for annual events and open auditorium for annual events like dance and fashion show are available. Canteen facility is not well, and students can't get a variety of food. Hostel facility is not provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus has 3-4 huge buildings to accommodate many departments. Many bus facilities are available. The campus has a huge library. Good facilities are available on the campus. The infrastructure is good. The security system is also good. You should visit the college once.

reviews.review_heading: Anyone can take admission in Neotech Technical campus, Vadodara.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is totally at its best and the college has a good environment. Our college has a hostel that is also divided into different parts for girls and boys. Just like other colleges, it is mandatory for hostel students that they will not go outside after 6 or 7 p.m. and I don't think this is at all a negative issue.

reviews.review_heading: The college members are so good we always prefer to study.
reviews.review_text: I studied computer Science and engineering. The computer Science department has the best professor you could get in this country. They are knowledgeable, well versed in their subjects and will always answer your questions. The curriculum is regularly update to match with the latest trend in the industry. For example, Python classes were introduced a couple of years back for my juniors due to its increased demand caused by AI and machine learning.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members, less placement, labs and sports equipments are good.
reviews.review_text: Campus life is best. In college, boys are more and girls are less. According to field wise in mechanic engineering, boys are more and girls are less, in computer engineering girls are more and boys are less, so it depends field wise. In the lab, machines and instruments are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Plastic Mould Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement to the companies .

review_content.Placements: Above 60% students get placements. 140000 is the lowest and average is 155300. 171000 was the highest package offered. Anand Gabriel Group, Motherson Chennai Alpla pvt. Lmt., etc., Recruit a large number of students. Above 60 and 70 but less than 60 also got appropriate jobs. Roles are CNC operator and mould manufacturer.
review_content.Infrastructure: CAD lab is present so we learn a lot of manufacturing. CNC lab is there where many CNC machines. And a plastic testing lab is available. We learn a lot of production work. Classrooms are also large, with projector room for digital study conference. Conference Room and Library is also present. Sport week is held every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Plastic Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for diploma.

review_content.Placements: The average salary package offered here is 1.2 LPA. About 100% of students got jobs from here. About 85% of students got placed from our course. Top companies which recruit students from here are Steelbird, Havells, Studs, Tata, Krishna Maruti, Lifelong and Supreme. Our batch was passed in 2019, and all students got good jobs. They all are happy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well here. All facilities are provided like good labs, classrooms and a suitable library. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are provided. Sports are available, and there are many games. The canteen is very clean every time, and benches are provided sufficiently.

overview_faqs.question: How good is Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Jaipur?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Jaipur are B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Jaipur has a rating of 4.35 by students. The college's Campus Life, Placements, Faculty, and Infrastructure have been rated as 4.75, 3.75, 4.25 and 4.5 respectively.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average starting salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering graduates?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Plastic Mould Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college for your future.

content.Placements: 100 percent of the students were placed. The highest package offered is around 8–9 lacs, the average package goes around 4–6 lacs, and the lowest package is about 2–3 lacs. Last year, around 98% of students got their internships from DPT and DPT courses in companies like Maruti Suzuki, Reliance, Tata, etc. Roles were offered first as operators and junior engineers.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities available for students here. This college has a library, which is divided into two sections: one is the digital library, and the other is for books and all, and Wi-Fi is available in the library. Hostels are in good condition; they have separate hostels for boys and girls, and hostels have Wi-Fi. There's a canteen on the campus and a cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Plastic Mould Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placement to the companies .

content.Placements: Above 60% students get placements. 140000 is the lowest and average is 155300. 171000 was the highest package offered. Anand Gabriel Group, Motherson Chennai Alpla pvt. Lmt., etc., Recruit a large number of students. Above 60 and 70 but less than 60 also got appropriate jobs. Roles are CNC operator and mould manufacturer.
content.Infrastructure: CAD lab is present so we learn a lot of manufacturing. CNC lab is there where many CNC machines. And a plastic testing lab is available. We learn a lot of production work. Classrooms are also large, with projector room for digital study conference. Conference Room and Library is also present. Sport week is held every year.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Plastic Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for diploma.

content.Placements: The average salary package offered here is 1.2 LPA. About 100% of students got jobs from here. About 85% of students got placed from our course. Top companies which recruit students from here are Steelbird, Havells, Studs, Tata, Krishna Maruti, Lifelong and Supreme. Our batch was passed in 2019, and all students got good jobs. They all are happy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very well here. All facilities are provided like good labs, classrooms and a suitable library. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are provided. Sports are available, and there are many games. The canteen is very clean every time, and benches are provided sufficiently.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The story of CIPET Jaipur in merit's words.

content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 10 LPA. Average package was 3.43 LPA. The lowest package was 3 LPA. Recruiting companies were Uflex, Motherson, Reliance, Vhaan, Ishita Robotics, Evershine Moulders, etc. You had to do your own internship, it was not provided by the college. Roles offered were assistant engineer, design engineer, junior engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were too good like Wi-Fi and labs for each department were available. Library was available with lots of books. All facilities were good in college. Hostel facilities were good. Quality of food available in mess was average, and canteen was also good.

college_info.intro:
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies for placements such as Movidu, Medi Assist, Raise Digital, and others. Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University students learn to select, create, and apply various appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools, including prediction and others. BTech students can become Software Developers, Software Testers, Database Administrators, and Software Engineers, or can go for other job profiles.
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University MBA students can become Managers, Business Analysts, or go for various other job profiles. Overall, JVWU is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JVWU Jaipur in the table provided below:

Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University BA tuition fee is INR 1.5 lakh. The total course fee include other components as well. reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The university invites good and reputed companies for the students to get apt corporate exposure. The highest salary package offered is 4.3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers available in our college make suitable efforts in order to get the students to learn and exemplify the level of knowledge and understanding. The course curriculum is good enough to provide students with perfect corporate knowledge. They make them ready to handle every situation. The expertise of the faculty members in the university is exceptional, and the efforts made by them are also commendable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50%-60% of the students are placed in every year. Students are offered roles like software tester, data scientist, data administrator, software engineer, etc. In our course, the maximum salary offered ranges from Rs. 45,000 to 4 lacs per month. C-CORE and all big companies visit our college, and I would suggest you take admission here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

faqs.answer: The application fee is INR 1,000 and INR 3,000 for research courses. Candidates may apply for one or more programmes by submitting separate application form along with the registration fee. Aspirants can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes or through DD or in Cheque/ Cash.
faqs.question: Q: What is the application fee for JVWU admission?

faqs.answer: JVWU conducts Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to various UG, PG and Diploma courses. The exam is held in online mode usually in May-June. JNEE question paper includes a total of 100 objective type questions (20 G.K. Questions and 80 subject related aptitude Questions) which is to be performed in 1 hours 30 minutes. Besides, admission in BAMS and BHMS programme is through NEET score.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam scores are accepted by JVWU for admission?

faqs.answer: JVWU fee is a sum of various components such as one-time fee, tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee differs specialisation-wise and also depends on the past academic score of the aspirants. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for JVWU?

faqs.answer: JVWU admissions are offered through four modes. One is through direct admission based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Others is via University Entrance cum Scholarship Exam (JNEE) or scholarship exam. Aspirants can also get admission via Management Quota. Candidates applying via Management Quota are evaluated based on their past academic records.
