review_summary.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. in Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.

content.Placements: JVWU is one of the best universities. I studied at this university for 4 years and passed out in 2022. It provides lots of opportunities for the future. It also offers both campus placements and non-campus placements. It provides recruitment in top educational companies like Byju's, Examadda, and many more. Approximately 70 to 75% of students got internships from this university.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This college had good placements in 2017, and there were excellent faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 60% of the students got placed in various companies. The highest salary package offered was 3.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. The top recruiting company was My operator, and the role offered was as HR. Around 80% of the students got internships. But I think there should reputed companies also come like TCS, Axis Bank and so on who should visit the campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. There was a lack of modern techniques of teaching like lack of digital classes, presentation, and so on. The hostel was also amazing, and we got the facility of Wi-Fi. Phones were not allowed, so I think that's why we were more indulged in our studies. Food served was also good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource Management (HRM) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The university invites good and reputed companies for the students to get apt corporate exposure. The highest salary package offered is 4.3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.
content.Faculty: Teachers available in our college make suitable efforts in order to get the students to learn and exemplify the level of knowledge and understanding. The course curriculum is good enough to provide students with perfect corporate knowledge. They make them ready to handle every situation. The expertise of the faculty members in the university is exceptional, and the efforts made by them are also commendable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 50%-60% of the students are placed in every year. Students are offered roles like software tester, data scientist, data administrator, software engineer, etc. In our course, the maximum salary offered ranges from Rs. 45,000 to 4 lacs per month. C-CORE and all big companies visit our college, and I would suggest you take admission here.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and placement activity.

content.Placements: 50% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is 4 Lacs p. a. and the lowest package offered is 2.3 Lacs p. a. top recruiting companies of our courses are Genus power, Core technosolutions, Appcino etc. Top roles offered in our course are data analyst, data administrator, data scientists, software developer, web developer, network analyst etc.
content.Infrastructure: University provides us best facilities in every possible way. The campus is very huge and hostel rooms are also good. Here we get 24x7 Wi-Fi, water and electricity. Mess served us good quality food and menu gets changed everyday. Talking about infrastructure of department we get facilitated by I. C. T tools, Wi-Fi is available in labs and libraries. For medical facilities we are having here homeopathy, ayurveda and allopathy hospitals.

admission_overview.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: JVWU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University admissionsare both merit or entrance-based. The university offers admission direct based on merit, through the university cum scholarship exam or via scholarship exam. JVWU conducts theJNEE or Joint National Entrance Examination,for regular courses.

Candidates can also get admission through Management/ NRI Quota.JVWUoffers UG, PG, and diploma courses in multiple streams, such as Arts, Science, Management, etc. The university also offers UG and PG courses in distance education. Interested candidates can apply for admission online.

Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University usually begins admission inFebruary. Candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the university. Find below the keyJVWU admissionhighlights:
Particulars
JVWU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Diploma
How to apply?
https://jvwu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

JVWU offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and diploma levels. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university offers direct merit-based admission to some of the UG and PG courses. Besides, JVWU also considers scores of the candidates in national, state or university-level entrance exams. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for topJVWU courses:

JVWU admission processbegins with registration via online mode. Candidates need to select their preferred mode of admission while filling out the application form. Below are step-wise admission details for JVWU:
STEP 1: JVWU Application Process 2025

The mode of application is both online and offline. The offline forms are attached in the prospectus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee ofINR 1,000for regular courses. The registration fee isINR 3,000for research programmes. Candidates need to pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Besides, aspirants can also collect the form offline.
STEP 2: Selection

Once registered, candidates are selected based on their mode of admission. During application, candidates need to select whether they want direct merit-based admission, through Management Quota, University scholarship exam orJNEEexam. The university conducts a Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to some of the UG and PG specialisations. For some of the courses, the university may also conduct a personal interview round for selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Counselling

The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Besides, aspirants must come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants applying for BAMS or BHMS need to participate in NEET Counselling. Selected candidates need to pay theJVWU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?

The applications of only the students with appropriate educational qualification is treated as valid. placement_data.title: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.5 LPA , INR 4.6 LPA and INR 4.56 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.32 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, according to the limited data available on the official placement report, the highest package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA . Further, the top recruiter during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 was Raise Digital . Apart from this, according to JVWU overall NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 4.35 LPA and INR 4.75 LPA , respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels are for Domicile of Jaipur, Ajmer & Sikar District only. Separate food is prepared daily with and without Onion. Special Food served as per the required timings during festivals for the students belonging to specific groups of Religion. Dining Hall (Mess) Facility.

library.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's Universities library has a rich collection of relevant books to support students' information needs, the E-Textbooks, E-Journals and easy accessibility to various Digital Libraries like DELNET, MANUPATRA etc. University also have separate departmental libraries

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

library.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's Universities library has a rich collection of relevant books to support students' information needs, the E-Textbooks, E-Journals and easy accessibility to various Digital Libraries like DELNET, MANUPATRA etc. University also have separate departmental libraries

hostel.description: Hostels are for Domicile of Jaipur, Ajmer & Sikar District only. Separate food is prepared daily with and without Onion. Special Food served as per the required timings during festivals for the students belonging to specific groups of Religion. Dining Hall (Mess) Facility.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

other_facilities: Centre of Internal Quality Assurance Cell

reviews.review_heading: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college had good placements in 2017, and there were excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. There was a lack of modern techniques of teaching like lack of digital classes, presentation, and so on. The hostel was also amazing, and we got the facility of Wi-Fi. Phones were not allowed, so I think that's why we were more indulged in our studies. Food served was also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and placement activity.
reviews.review_text: University provides us best facilities in every possible way. The campus is very huge and hostel rooms are also good. Here we get 24x7 Wi-Fi, water and electricity. Mess served us good quality food and menu gets changed everyday. Talking about infrastructure of department we get facilitated by I. C. T tools, Wi-Fi is available in labs and libraries. For medical facilities we are having here homeopathy, ayurveda and allopathy hospitals.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our university is good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities provided here are good. Our college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility on the campus, hostels and classrooms. The campus is eco-friendly, and the infrastructure is maintained by considering green, clean, happiness protocol. There are well-structured classrooms and libraries. E-library is provided to enhance education. The food is served for 4 times with a perfect diet, and special food is provided on weekends. There are 24x7 medical facilities. Sports and cul...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is among 10 topmost colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in the heart of the city. Jaipur is a  natural choice and preferred destination for students from different parts of the country to pursue professional educations. Separate hostel facilities are provided for girls on the campus. It has adequate high security and good discipline.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure. Teaching facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department are well-equipped. Computer labs are categorised into ERP labs, DBMS lab, etc. There are ICT classrooms and lecture halls. There is a library with computer facilities and there is a server room.  Quality of facilities in our hostel is good. There is a laundary facility, 24x7 internet facility, night attendance at respective hostels and also time to time cleaning for both rooms and washrooms. Quality of food available in the mess and cant...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities, infrastructure, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi facility in labs, ICT in the classrooms, library with technical facilities, ICT in the lecture halls and server room. Facilities like air-conditioned rooms, ducting rooms, attached and non-attached washrooms, Wi-Fi and LAN facilities 24x7, night attendance and time to time cleaning by the staffs are available in the hostel. Quality of food served to the students is good. Medical facilities are 24x7 available with an ambulance. The college provides a tea...

reviews.review_heading: Faculties were good, hostel facility was the best as the mess food was tasty.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities were good like hostel classrooms library medical sports and games. Campus was good overall 
Also there was facility of bank inside the campus and also discotheque and gym for entertainment purpose. Overall everything was good. Music room was there and teachers for every field like sports teacher and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Jayoti Vidhyapeeth Women's University is very good for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All the facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are very good. Classrooms have projectors. Medical facilities are available as they are very important. Games and sports classes are conducted every day.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is a mixture of fun and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi and smart classrooms. There are a well-furnished library, sports ground, game centre, etc. The university provides all kind of facilities. Labs are well-equipped. The campus has a huge playground and a lawn. Everything is good here, but the food served in the canteen is a little expensive. I suggest the college to focus on food prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private women's university in India. The campus is great.
reviews.review_text: The university provides the best facilities to the students in every way. The campus is very huge, and hostel rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi facilities are provided 24x7 in hostel rooms. Mess facilities are also provided for hostellers. The quality of the food served is good. The menu is changed every week. All residential facilities are provided on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A safe and disciplined women's university for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The university will provide all the required facilities. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The university provides proper sports and medical facilities. Classrooms and labs were good, but the quality of labs needs some improvement. Hostel rooms, mess and canteen facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed, the best experience. All facilities are provided under one roof.
reviews.review_text: The campus has different buildings for engineering, law and medicine. The campus is lush green. There are swings to enjoy. Playgrounds and cafeterias are available in the college. The best part is the hostel which is present on the campus. It is the safest place.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

I suggest you do not expect that Google or Amazon will visit the college for placements. I would say electrical, mechanical, and civil students' future is not good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The canteen facility is not that much good. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and they do not allow mobile on the campus. There is no parking facility for students, so do not hope to go on your bike.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good college for students who want their future bright.

content.Placements: There is very little chance of placement in our college and most of the companies visiting the campus are call centers. There is no importance of engineering if we do a job in call centers. There is a very bad system for placements in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has many labs, classrooms, and a library. In our college, there are a total of four buildings. A canteen is also available but the quality of the canteen is not good, so I don't prefer the canteen and also the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is excellent, including the surroundings and the ambiance. The food served is very good and medical supplies are available. Labs and classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best in studies.
reviews.review_text: College will not provide you with free Wi-Fi but rooms are fine, the canteen is also good. Sports events are organised every year. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: We have good working facilities. A library is provided for students to study.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to grow your skills by yourself, then join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The canteen facility is not that much good. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and they do not allow mobile on the campus. There is no parking facility for students, so do not hope to go on your bike.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college for students who want their future bright.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs, classrooms, and a library. In our college, there are a total of four buildings. A canteen is also available but the quality of the canteen is not good, so I don't prefer the canteen and also the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: When I was in college, the canteen was not that good. The infrastructure of the canteen is also not that good at that time. Our college provides few sports like cricket, football, volleyball, etc. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Only bookish knowledge is provided, which is not much active for real-life challenges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a nice infrastructure, but Wi-Fi is not there in college. They don't allow mobile phones on campus, and labs are old. Lab materials are old, and classrooms are not well managed. There is a need for a lot of improvements regarding infrastructure. The hostel is not available in this college, so we have to arrange our accommodation on our own.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Vadodara. I am proud to be a student of this college.
reviews.review_text: In our department, we have a concrete lab, environment lab, physics lab, etc.  All the facilities provided in our course are very good. There are many classrooms and a  huge and comfortable library on our campus. Medical facilities are also provided. There is a canteen on campus which serves health and good food. Sports and games are good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of academics, good environment, placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. A lot of gardens and a playground are available here. The college celebrates events like Virotsav. There are good infrastructural facilities. All the labs available here are good, and almost all the lab sessions are organised here. Even the air-conditioning facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a very big and vast infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is big as it contains many buildings. It has different buildings for students of different years. It has a beautiful library, labs, and instruments for educational purpose. There is a beautiful playground which can be used for sports as well as cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: If you only want to study academics and do not want to gain practical knowledge, go for it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was common. There were no facilities for the canteen inside the campus. Also, there were no good hostel facilities inside the college campus. Students can either take PG or rent in the outskirt area of Vadodara city. So, the hostel facility was bad.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and has a highly developed infrastructure. Facilities like sports, ground, library and hospital are provided. The hospital is worth rupees 250 crores. The college has an elevator too.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the institute was quite good, and it was equipped with proper lab facilities that supported academic and practical learning. However, due to the remote location and travel distance, many students find it difficult to attend regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied. You can take admission here. Its overall a good college.

review_content.Placements: It has placement of CS department better than any other branches. A lot of companies are recruiting a no. Of students every year. Minimum package-2.4 LPA, Maximum package-12 LPA. Seniors are placed in good companies like Infosys, LnT, Wipro, Tcs. About 60-65% get interns from college. There is a good team of teachers in the placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. Wi-Fi zones. Sports facilities. Games outdoor and indoor present. Smart classes for studies. Food is average in canteen. There are varieties of food. Price is little costly. But for quality is nice. Hostel room are clean and tidy. Hostel are not so good.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Overall college is at its best and is improving day by day to enhance the skills of students.

review_content.Placements: Placements are increasing every year and this time 9L package is being bagged by our college students. Infosys, honda and many other companies come and take all the capable students with them. Teams are being prepared for the college placements as well as for the GATE exams preparations as well which are useful enough for the students to be selected in placements or can score better marks in GATE exams. This time aiifa is being apointed for the preparation of GATE exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and all facilities are available with best usage of all the facilities and classrooms are good, some smart classes are also there. Hostels are good and mess food is upto the mark. Good care of hostel students are been taken. Full Wi-Fi campus, playground is big enough to play any of the games like football, cricket, baseball etc. All Sports are being played and other college students are also invited in the organised sports event and prizes are given to them. Large auditorium is there for any cultural event or any indoor event to be organised and it is large enough to handle 1000 students or more.

United Institute of Technology offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Robotics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering.

faqs.question: Which courses does United Institute of Technology offer to students?

answer.text: United Institute of Technology offers Degree courses including 9 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. United Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Robotics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at United Institute of Technology?

answer.text: United Institute of Technology has been rated 4 on placements on the basis of 2 reviews done by students. In United Institute of Technology, 372 students were admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 186 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 185 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 240000 and 1 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 315 students were admitted, out of which 93 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 74 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 280000 and 4 students got selected for higher studies. In United Institute of Technology, 277 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 187 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 72 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 262000 and 6 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: Does United Institute of Technology provide good placement facilities?

answer.text: United Institute of Technology offers median package range of (aprx)INR 262,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 4 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

faqs.question: How much placements salary students get after studying in United Institute of Technology?

answer.text: Yes, a career in Robotics pays well in India. In India, robotics engineers make an average yearly pay of INR 6 LPA. The level of expertise, the sector and the location, however, can all affect the income. The salary for following domains are given as belows (for candidates having minimum 2-3 years of experience)Defence Sector: 8-9 LPAManufacturing: 7- 8 LPAAutomotive: 8- 9 LPAProfessionals can anticipate a nice salary if Robotics is their field of choice in India. Robotics engineers are in high demand as the industry expands quickly. In India, Robotics is a field where one can succeed if one has the necessary training and expertise.

faqs.question: Is Robotics a high paying career?

review_summary.college_name: United Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: United Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: The college provides us with opportunities to work with MNC companies. The college prepared us for placement interviews during the pre-final year. The college also provided placement training. The college facilities also helped us to improve ourselves.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel here is safe and secure, and the food and facilities are good. However, the Wi-Fi doesn't always work properly and the mess and canteen are only available during specific time periods. In the mess, they provide food three times a day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. Almost 95% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Many top companies visit our college to recruit students. They organise placement training.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. They charge for Wi-Fi. Some classrooms are equipped with projectors. We need more practical lessons, but they conduct more theory sessions.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are fair and knowledgeable. Our college is affiliated with Anna University. The pass percentage is 50%. Exams are conducted strictly. If you are caught doing unnecessary activities or malpractice, you'll be banned by the university from attempting exams for five years.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied. You can take admission here. Its overall a good college.

content.Placements: It has placement of CS department better than any other branches. A lot of companies are recruiting a no. Of students every year. Minimum package-2.4 LPA, Maximum package-12 LPA. Seniors are placed in good companies like Infosys, LnT, Wipro, Tcs. About 60-65% get interns from college. There is a good team of teachers in the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. Wi-Fi zones. Sports facilities. Games outdoor and indoor present. Smart classes for studies. Food is average in canteen. There are varieties of food. Price is little costly. But for quality is nice. Hostel room are clean and tidy. Hostel are not so good.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall college is at its best and is improving day by day to enhance the skills of students.

content.Placements: Placements are increasing every year and this time 9L package is being bagged by our college students. Infosys, honda and many other companies come and take all the capable students with them. Teams are being prepared for the college placements as well as for the GATE exams preparations as well which are useful enough for the students to be selected in placements or can score better marks in GATE exams. This time aiifa is being apointed for the preparation of GATE exam.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and all facilities are available with best usage of all the facilities and classrooms are good, some smart classes are also there. Hostels are good and mess food is upto the mark. Good care of hostel students are been taken. Full Wi-Fi campus, playground is big enough to play any of the games like football, cricket, baseball etc. All Sports are being played and other college students are also invited in the organised sports event and prizes are given to them. Large auditorium is there for any cultural event or any indoor event to be organised and it is large enough to handle 1000 students or more.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Average placement and fine facilities.

content.Placements: Placed only on IT company. What is the use studying a different course and getting paid for doing job which is not relevent. May be 1 or 2 placed in core that too for marketing. There is a placement cell which is mainly focused for IT sectors. Eventhough Core company came but they wanted only female employee.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, Classroom are fine, Wi-Fi facility only for who registered. Sports and games are good. Very sorry for the hostel boys for the food, before they suffered a lot with the food. Now it changed I think so. First two blocks are good with infrastructure but the next two blocks have only one stair for 400 to 500 students. Emergency cases have to considered.

For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 108445 to 148849. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college and the department.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the best especially the architectural work in the elevation and a good appearance inside. They provide 24 hours free Wi-Fi for both the college campus and the hostel campus. There is an excellent library in our college and a technically sound lab available in our department. The gymnasium and games play a major role here. Good quality food is available both in the canteen and the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: United Institute of Technology - pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay when compared to other developing colleges. There is no separate department for civil. The library is not equipped like other developed colleges. The library should be equipped. A separate department should be allocated for civil engineering. There is no separate department for ME students too.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best for students because of management.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi, labs and medical facilities are available. It is the best in sports and games.
The labs are best for sample test and reading but not in a high efficiency.
The classrooms are best for learning and projectors are used to teaching.
The canteen and hostel mess food are very bad. Hostel rooms are very good. There are no infrastructure-based issues.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome place for average students.
reviews.review_text: Our college is 20 km away from Coimbatore. It comes under Periyanaickenpalayam town, surrounded by hills. We have 24*7 Wi-Fi facilities all over the college (even in hostels). Classrooms are elegant and are maintained well by the sweepers every day. Our library is located in the main block with more than 10000 books related to the subjects and e-learning facilities. In the academic year 2017-18, our football team got placed 2nd in our zone and the cricket team was the number 1 team in our zone. ...

Being a relatively new college (started in year 2009), the infrastructure is still in development stage. However, the college has good industry linkages and number of companies which come for placement but it is steadily rising. 50 companies came when I was in my final year, with an average package of 3 LPA. Classes are regular and most sessions are very interactive. There are guest lectures as well as industry visits organized quite frequently. The number of students per class is around 40, sin... highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Patel College of Science and Technology, Bhopal:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Patel College of Science and Technology, Bhopal offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Patel College of Science and Technology, Bhopal offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Patel College of Science and Technology, Bhopal fee structure for all the courses is around INR 40,000 to 1,68,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for study but not for placements.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements here. Our college does not provide internships in any small company. Our college is only to pay money and get your degree. There will be no other benefits. So it is your choice to study here or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good building and space. There are poor lab facilities. Wi-Fi and classrooms are very good, and classrooms are huge. The auditorium is also good, and the library is a little bit smaller but good. The hostel is not much good, but you can enjoy yourself with your friends. There are no restrictions. You can enjoy sports and games because there is a lot of space.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities in our college are good.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% of students got placed with low packages. The highest package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest package is 1 LPA. Local private companies recruit from here. No one can get an internship here. The top role offered is a web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good. The facilities are good. All the courses have separate buildings, separate libraries, classrooms and other facilities. All the facilities are available in the hostel such as food, mess, medical, sports etc.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Patel College of Science and Technology, Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has very good environment.

content.Placements: The average salary package offered was 3 LPA. Local companies visited our college to offer placements. The minimum salary package was 1.5 LPA. The placement cell prepared students to face interviews and get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was average but the garden and ground were impressive. Auditorium and main building lecture halls were very good. Students can visit the library whenever needed. The bus facility was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good but not the best.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed with the highest salary packages of 30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Its construction is massive, well-designed, and planned. It gives a creative experience to engage in fun and enjoyment. Our college provides the best facilities to handle emergency situations. It is one of the well-reputed institutions in Bhopal which provides the best facilities for education and other curriculum activities.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well disciplined and make students fit for a career. They give very knowledgeable information to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for study but not for placements.

content.Placements: There are no placements here. Our college does not provide internships in any small company. Our college is only to pay money and get your degree. There will be no other benefits. So it is your choice to study here or not.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good building and space. There are poor lab facilities. Wi-Fi and classrooms are very good, and classrooms are huge. The auditorium is also good, and the library is a little bit smaller but good. The hostel is not much good, but you can enjoy yourself with your friends. There are no restrictions. You can enjoy sports and games because there is a lot of space.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities in our college are good.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students got placed with low packages. The highest package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest package is 1 LPA. Local private companies recruit from here. No one can get an internship here. The top role offered is a web developer.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good. The facilities are good. All the courses have separate buildings, separate libraries, classrooms and other facilities. All the facilities are available in the hostel such as food, mess, medical, sports etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students got placed from our batch. The highest salary package was offered to our batch, and it was 12 LPA by Jaro Education, and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Maximum students of our college got their internship in 3rd year and now they are enhancing their skills.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have facilities like Wi-Fi, smart class, smart labs, library, computer labs, doubt classes, and awesome academic faculty members. Along with studies, the food served in our college is delicious. We also have a court of basketball and volleyball. We also have kabbadi.

The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,12,000 - 1,68,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was average but the garden and ground were impressive. Auditorium and main building lecture halls were very good. Students can visit the library whenever needed. The bus facility was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good but not the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Its construction is massive, well-designed, and planned. It gives a creative experience to engage in fun and enjoyment. Our college provides the best facilities to handle emergency situations. It is one of the well-reputed institutions in Bhopal which provides the best facilities for education and other curriculum activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for study but not for placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good building and space. There are poor lab facilities. Wi-Fi and classrooms are very good, and classrooms are huge. The auditorium is also good, and the library is a little bit smaller but good. The hostel is not much good, but you can enjoy yourself with your friends. There are no restrictions. You can enjoy sports and games because there is a lot of space.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities in our college are good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good. The facilities are good. All the courses have separate buildings, separate libraries, classrooms and other facilities. All the facilities are available in the hostel such as food, mess, medical, sports etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have facilities like Wi-Fi, smart class, smart labs, library, computer labs, doubt classes, and awesome academic faculty members. Along with studies, the food served in our college is delicious. We also have a court of basketball and volleyball. We also have kabbadi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is everything to study, great infrastructure, great libraries, nice canteen, a great playground, and all types of games. There is a nice hostel. There are great buses. There are a good study environment and many things to be an engineer. So if you are willing to take part so you should choose this college for that.

reviews.review_heading: Patel College has one of the best teaching faculty. The infrastructure is good as well.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available here. There are smart classrooms. There are almost 3-4 labs every semester. Every department has its own separate buildings, and every building has its own library. There are well-furnished rooms with fans, lights, tables, and chairs. The hot water facility is there. The food served in the college canteen is really good, and the kitchen is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Average and pocket friendly College In Bhopal For CSE & IT Students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is improving rapidly. Although a well-equipped library with more than 50,000+ books available. Other things Like Ragging free zone, Smoking free zone, well college thinks about students and their problems as they put weekly test for student so that they can complete their units or chapter on time which also help us to be prepared for our final semester exams. The canteen is average as you get only few things here like Samosa Kauchori. Our college organizes state level event twice ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I would rate 5/10 for college. College is good for good students and bad for bad ones.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and it is improving every year at a good scale. The college has three libraries having every book related to the course. Computer labs are provided with internet facility. There is one canteen in college which is not that good. There is a boys hostel near the college, and meals are provided in the same canteen.

reviews.review_heading: An average college in Bhopal to do B.E/B.Tech in CSE.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is improving rapidly. Although, there is a well-equipped library with more than 50,000 books. Other facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, digital classrooms, medical facilities, games and sports centre are also up to the mark. The canteen here is average as all snacks like samosa and others are easily available. The food tastes like typical hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: Completely dissatisfied due faculty, staff, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi good, also class room is good, but no required equipment in labs. Very bad quantity of labs. After 1st year we have not perform any lab experiment in labs. In looking college campus is really good. Library is good. College organize every year games, events.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: PCST has everything of the latest versions. Even payment of fees can be done through Paytm. It has better classrooms, Awesome Library, Annual games and functions are conducted twice a year. Best college for average student's. I recommend this college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the good campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus and classrooms are good. The canteen is not bad. All types of games facilities are available for the students, and a large playground is there for the students to play outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, football, etc. All types of indoor games facilities are available like ludo, pool, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: All the things are good in the college and it is the best college.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure with free Wi-Fi. Labs are excellent with good trainers. There are wide range of classrooms and a big library with all the books available with full space to study. There are good medical facilities because there is a pharmacy department. Overall, things are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college because they give time to prepare for further competitive exams.
reviews.review_text: The labs are well-equipped. The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. The library is too good. There is good intention towards sports and games. The canteen is one of the Bhopal best canteens. Overall, the infrastructure is good. Honestly, I didn't face any problem related to infrastructure.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of its faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 40 students were placed. The salary package offered was 4 LPA. The top recruiter was Infosys. About 60% of students got internships at Makers Tech Innovation Pvt. Ltd. Graduate engineer trainee and software engineer roles were offered. They offered upskilling training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were good. The infrastructure was good. Labs and all other facilities were good. The canteen was good. Sports facilities were good. I would give 4 stars for all the facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were knowledgeable and very supportive. Students who graduated from this college were industry-ready. It was very difficult to clear the exams. The pass percentage was 95%. Knowledgeable students were able to crack the exams at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives a bright future for knowledgeable students.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, the average salary package was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Codilar and Infosys. Around 30% of students got internships at Verzeo. Top roles offered were programmer analyst, software associate, and system engineer. Students from all the branches got jobs in the IT industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library was very good. Labs were clean and they had all the needed equipment. Classrooms were good and had enough benches. The infrastructure of our college was in progress. Canteen served the best food, coffee, tea, and snacks. Cricket and sports were given importance in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Engineering life here is very good, and you can enjoy and outshine your future.

review_content.Placements: Very few students get placed here. Companies do not visit the college for placements. Some students get placed in various departments on their own. Some of the good companies in Mysore and Bangalore, like BYJU's, Infosys, and many others come here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good for learning, but the hostel facilities are not provided. The campus is enabled with good Wi-Fi at a good speed. Labs are well maintained, and the faculty are well-trained. There are good sports teams for football and cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I considered CSE branch for a better future.

content.Placements: About 50% of the total students enrolled in the year 2023 are in the Computer Science and Engineering branch, and the top recruiters are TCS, IBM, Infosys, etc. Here, students are encouraged to start their own businesses, even though there are various personality development courses that provide exposure to various emerging technologies and participation in coding contests.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, and the studies faculty members are excellent here. We get 100% support from professors, and the quality of education is okay. Canteen food is okay. Medical facilities are available for aid and other encouragement for blood donation. Other camps are organized at the campus. Wi-Fi is available during the college's running hours, and students get access easily and even at the library. Computers are available for students who cannot afford laptops.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really bad college. Not recommended.

content.Placements: There are very few members who are been placed in this college. They just take money in the name of internship they do nothing good in internship programme they are just forcing students to pay for the internship they are not allowed to travel in their own vehicle they force us to use their damn transportation facility which is not good .
content.Infrastructure: Not good at all it is just waste of time to join here the college is super small campus is not good no playground no sports no Wi-Fi for students labs are small not good need lots of improvements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of its faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: About 40 students were placed. The salary package offered was 4 LPA. The top recruiter was Infosys. About 60% of students got internships at Makers Tech Innovation Pvt. Ltd. Graduate engineer trainee and software engineer roles were offered. They offered upskilling training.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were good. The infrastructure was good. Labs and all other facilities were good. The canteen was good. Sports facilities were good. I would give 4 stars for all the facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers were knowledgeable and very supportive. Students who graduated from this college were industry-ready. It was very difficult to clear the exams. The pass percentage was 95%. Knowledgeable students were able to crack the exams at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives a bright future for knowledgeable students.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, the average salary package was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Codilar and Infosys. Around 30% of students got internships at Verzeo. Top roles offered were programmer analyst, software associate, and system engineer. Students from all the branches got jobs in the IT industry.
content.Infrastructure: Library was very good. Labs were clean and they had all the needed equipment. Classrooms were good and had enough benches. The infrastructure of our college was in progress. Canteen served the best food, coffee, tea, and snacks. Cricket and sports were given importance in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Engineering life here is very good, and you can enjoy and outshine your future.

content.Placements: Very few students get placed here. Companies do not visit the college for placements. Some students get placed in various departments on their own. Some of the good companies in Mysore and Bangalore, like BYJU's, Infosys, and many others come here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good for learning, but the hostel facilities are not provided. The campus is enabled with good Wi-Fi at a good speed. Labs are well maintained, and the faculty are well-trained. There are good sports teams for football and cricket.

paragraphs: Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology admissions are based on merit. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 7,44,444. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

description: Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 28158 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 28158 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 23571.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 171598 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 266233, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Mysuru Royal Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 96843 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate at our college is less than 70%. The highest package is 5.5–6 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.8 LPA. In college, companies like Infosys, TCS, and some startups visited. Overall experience is good at this tier-3 college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college facilities, we have Wi-Fi, all subject labs, one library, a play ground, canteen and a computer lab. A hostel is available for both boys and girls but the mess and food are not so good. Medical facilities are not available in emergency situations.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college infrastructure is good, but I just want to have a strong management system.

review_content.Placements: About 50 students are studying in our college. We have different projects semester wise. Every year students do an internship in Visakhapatnam, Hyderabad, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides OS lab, C lab and different types of experiments for us. Seminar halls are also available here. Batch wise classrooms are available, and cameras are provided in all the rooms. Biometric system had been provided to us. Our college has a central library, volleyball court, cricket ground and also a friends club for our recreation in the free or leisure time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good but doesn't offer placements. If you don't prefer placements, then it is good.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements, so many students suffered due to this. Whatever companies they invite the campus for placements are fake. Even they asked money for placements, and they returned later. None of the students got placed in our batch. Every student gets jobs once they passed out of college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and the library is huge. Labs and faculty members were good. I didn't stay in the hostel, so I don't know about the hostel, but our cafeteria was good. There was no Wi-Fi facility. You will have many places and events to enjoy with your friends. Bus and transportation facility are also good, but the management is not great.

faqs.answer: Roland Institute Of Technology has courses such as B.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Roland Institute Of Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Roland Institute Of Technology is up to 510. Good thing to know is that Roland Institute Of Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: Q: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Roland Institute Of Technology?

faqs.answer: Roland Institute Of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. OR Candidate who have completed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level can also apply. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Hostel facility is also available, and all facilities are provided. Canteen facilities are available, and we have a cafeteria park. There is a big ground to play.  Transport facilities for traveling students are available. The classrooms of every branch have Wi-Fi facilities. Other facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: We choose Roland for a better future.
reviews.review_text: In our college, if we judge based on our fee, then our infrastructure is too good compared to other colleges. Our college provides well-maintained classrooms with proper ventilation, benches, and tables. It also provides AC labs with high-speed Wi-Fi support for both students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: To know about Roland before admission .
reviews.review_text: The class rooms are not so well maintained and sitting desk was too old . College doesn't have wifi facility for students . Labs are well maintained . In central library you can get any books you want for self study . The hostel is not so well maintained . The food quality is avarage . No medical facilty is available only first aid kit is available . For sports and game this college have limited space . You can play games like kabbadi , cricket, basket ball .

reviews.review_heading: Recently 155 students of our college got placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, our department is computer science is placed on the top floor of the college and there no elevator to travel to the top floor. Our classroom is on the 4th floor, there are several classrooms and our classroom has an amount of furniture,4 fans, and 2 tube lights.

reviews.review_heading: I am Sai and I am currently studying in computer science. I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: If we compare the infrastructure to price, then it is far better than other colleges. Our college provides well-maintained classrooms with fans and windows. It also provides AC laboratory for students and well-maintained library for improvement of students' knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCET - Murshidabad College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Our college has a playground, but sports instruments are fewer. The food served in the canteen is expensive. They provide a variety of food items. Our college has a library. Medical facilities are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are not available in our college like Wi-Fi, laboratories, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility in the hostel and on campus is good. One of the things that you never get in any college is fresh air because it is present in quite a good place. There is a canteen, and there are a lot of food stores nearby. The hostel facility is one of the best things about the college. The hostel life gives you the best experience of your life and transforms you from a boy to a man.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, but placements are not good and faculty is not permanent.
reviews.review_text: The college has no Wi-Fi facilities. The labs are decent. The campus is big but not maintained. Faculty members are good. The hostel facility is available. But hostels are not maintained. Some hostels building are demolished, broken, and not maintained. They provide goofing and lodging. The rooms are huge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best teachers, infrastructure, decent placements and a friendly atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides decent labs with equipment, classrooms and a library. The library does not have all the books. I do not stay in the college hostel, so I do not know about the hostel and food. The food served in the canteen is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Good Faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All type of facilities like medical, sports, television is available in our hostel. A separate Sports ground is available in our hostel. The quality of food is good in the mess. Our college has good Infrastructure. Every department like Civil and Mechanical have a separate workshop and Electrical, ECE, Computer Science have a separate lab, classroom, Library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college for getting only a degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the exposure is missing there. The general subjects like physics, chemistry, and environment have a good team of faculty. But the core engineering needs more capable and experienced faculty. I think this goes for all of our college departments, and the rest is okay.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is the best college for proper study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The classrooms are comfortable and clean. The library has a variety of books required by the students. Our college cares about the health of the students by conducting various sports events. The medical facilities are also good. The labs are too peaceful to have a proper study.

reviews.review_heading: A review about Murshidabad College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Lab equipment is strong enough to do all experiments. Extra classrooms are provided for doing a lot of fun.

reviews.review_heading: The mightiest college of Murshidabad, MCET.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the most popular B.Tech college in Murshidabad and we are thankful for that. In our college, we have Wi-Fi facility, labs, good classroom, a library with lots of books. There is no medical facility though I am sure it will be available soon, and sports and games facilities are also available. There are 2 labs for civil engineering and I can't tell about other department labs and classrooms. Two types of food are available in the canteen, bread and tea and bread and egg. I haven't ...

reviews.review_heading: A good college and very important for us.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good campus. There is Wi-Fi on the campus, but Wi-Fi is not of good speed. The minimum speed is 100 Kb. The labs are good, but many computers are not in access and damaged. The classrooms are good but do not have AC. The college medical facility is not available. The sports are not available, but annual sports are conducted.

reviews.review_text: It has been shifted in mehandiya before 3 months so still there are some difficulties to study but it will be resolved in a month so its a great news it has an issue of light because still, it has not their transformer but it will be resolved in a month told by the principal and yes it has hostel issue right now because it has shifted recently and because of this every student even faculty members also struggle a lot.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of good teachers, placements, very good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus life, supportive faculty, strong placements, and good infrastructure.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and a library to improve our course. The food served in the canteen is not good. Students carry their lunch boxes to avoid canteen food. There is one sports week in a year.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is good. This course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are easy. If we study, we can score well in the mid-exam. It is useful for the final exam and can clear the semester exams easily.

admission_process.title: Pacific School of Engineering, Surat Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pacific School of Engineering, Surat admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Pacific School of Engineering, Suratoffers courses at UG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,20,500. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. After 10th courses are offered for 3 years.

courses_data.description: Pacific School of Engineering, Surat offers a full time B.E. / B.Tech course. This course is offered at UG level. faqs.question: How many seats are available at Pacific School of Engineering, Surat for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Pacific School of Engineering, Surat is up to 600. Good thing to know is that Pacific School of Engineering, Surat has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

description: Pacific School of Engineering, Surat cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Pacific School of Engineering, Surat cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Pacific School of Engineering, Surat BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 29416 and 39955 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.E. in Civil Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 29416 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.E. in Computer Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Pacific School of Engineering, Surat accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Pacific School of Engineering, Surat can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Pacific School of Engineering, Surat GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
