reviews.review_heading: They provided good placement in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and other facilities are good like classrooms, labs, library, etc. Hostel and food facilities are also good. Sports and games are all available like cricket, volleyball, chess, carrom, and separate grounds in college to management. They provide 2-3 lectures in provide weekly.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good but the infrastructure is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as per the fees of the college. It has Wi-Fi, and a library free of cost. It provides good hostel facilities with an affordable price. The college has a spacious canteen, multiple sports ground including football ground, volleyball ground, cricket ground etc. They also have indoor games facilities like table tennis, chess, carrom, badminton etc. It has a good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are not much good compared to other colleges. Our college provides facilities like labs, classrooms, and libraries. Our canteen and its food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like WI-FI, labs, classrooms and library are available in the college. This is the best college and nice infrastructure is available. The best facilities are available in our college. Some activities like sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and a library to improve our course. The food served in the canteen is not good. Students carry their lunch boxes to avoid canteen food. There is one sports week in a year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and teaching quality is also better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in this college. Our campus is green and every building has a Wi-Fi connection. There are four laboratories with good computers. Other departments have modern laboratories and instruments. Classrooms are big and they also provide projectors for students. The library is huge, and various books are available. Separate boys and girls hostels are available. The food served in the canteen is average. The playground is huge. Sports like football, cricket, and volleyball are ...

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements but not a good salary.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in all florals and for the hostel students. The classroom is not in good condition, but the library is available on the last floor, and mostly the required books are available in our college library. In our college 3 sports grounds are available, one for cricket, one for volleyball, and one for other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because the equipment in labs doesn't work well.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are average. In this current year, the hostel facilities are in progress. The quality of food in the canteen is average. A cricket ground and a volleyball ground are available. A sports week is conducted here.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college of same as the all the city have college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, hostel facilities are available, but I am a day scholar. It provides bus transportation, and it is good. Hostel of our college is recently open at least 1 year ago and its good also has Wi-Fi facilities, and it provides good mess and canteen. The library is also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The fee is very affordable.
reviews.review_text: A library is available. Theatre type classrooms are available. The canteen is clean, regular and healthy. A cricket ground and a football ground are available. For every department, practical labs are available. Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: The management is very weak, but teaching staff members are good. Placement records are not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are huge here and have theatre-like sitting arrangements. Approximately 100 students can accommodate in one classroom, and toilets are available on every floor. But air-conditioners are not available. Wi-Fi router is available, but Wi-Fi doesn't work. The library does not have the latest curriculum books. In our college, there were no hostels. In the canteen, the quality of the food served is good. Computer labs and other labs are not much good, and the internet is the main problem.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and its fee structure and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good here, and the campus has a huge playground and good labs with equipment and accessories. There is also a good canteen. The quality of the food served on the campus is also good. Events and sports day are also celebrated, so sports and games are also included. But there is no hostel facility on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, and it provides a good education. Staff is encouraging and friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, classrooms, digital projector, library, dancing hall and communication hall. The college does not provide hostel facility, but the quality of food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games ground are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college provides a good infrastructure with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs are well organised. As an engineering college, it has its own mechanical as well as civil material testing lab. It owns the environment technology lab certified by the government, which allows the testing of different kinds of spent wash from different industries. The college also owns a huge library with more than 1000s of different reference books and other courses. The hygienic canteen is also well very good. The college organises the cultu...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good faculty, infrastructure, facilities and labs.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Classrooms are very comfortable for students to study. Labs are available for all subjects in the college. A library is available. Every sport like cricket, football, Kabaddi, badminton, etc., is played in college. Quality of food served in the canteen is good, and all types of healthy and tasty food items are available in the canteen.
